message:
Add missing-subcommand hints and fix FTS table detection for FrankenSQLite

Two improvements:

1. Add format_missing_subcommand_error() to produce targeted, actionable
   error messages when a command group (analytics, sources, models, import)
   is invoked without a subcommand. Lists available sub-subcommands and
   usage examples so AI agents can self-correct without guessing.

2. Fix doctor's FTS table existence check (issues #116/#117). The previous
   approach queried sqlite_master for fts_messages, but FrankenSQLite
   filters virtual tables with rootpage=0, making the table invisible even
   when it exists. Switch to a direct probe query against fts_messages —
   if the table is genuinely absent the query errors out, otherwise it
   succeeds regardless of sqlite_master visibility.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
